title: Etsy Earnings Q1 2026 Beat Revenue Expectations on GMS Growth
text: Etsy reported Q1 2026 earnings that beat revenue expectations, with the company demonstrating a turnaround in core marketplace metrics. Revenue of $631.3 million exceeded the consensus forecast of $620.9 million, representing 3.1% year-over-year growth. Adjusted earnings per share came in at $0.89 versus expectations of $0.62, representing a significant beat. Gross merchandise sales on the core Etsy marketplace increased 5.5% year-over-year to $2.46 billion, marking the second consecutive quarter of GMS growth. Active buyer growth occurred for the first time in two years on a sequential basis, demonstrating improved marketplace engagement. GMS per active buyer improved 4.8% year-over-year to $122 on a trailing twelve-month basis, marking the fourth consecutive quarter of improvement. The company's adjusted EBITDA margin expanded to 29% in Q1, exceeding guidance of 27% to 29%. Management attributed the turnaround to successful implementation of AI-driven personalization and search improvements, mobile app growth (11.2% YoY), and high-margin advertising growth (10.5% YoY for services revenue).
